name: Katsuragi - Senran Kagura
description:
"Sexual harassment is forbidden, unless you're me!" - Katsuragi

- "She's just like me for real!" -

A tomboyish and perverted shinobi who's favorite hobby is groping cute girls. Katsuragi is the most relatable character in Senran Kagura, because she is just as much of a pervert as we all are. As you'd expect, she should be mostly lore-accurate, and all of her classmates from the original game are included. So if you want to bring either Ikaruga, Katsuragi, Hibari, or Yagyū into the scene, you totally can. I have also included Ayame, since I figured "Why not?" That and someone has to give Katsuragi a taste of her own medicine from time to time, after all.

I'm going to keep it real, I basically just pasted her wiki page here and added several tweaks so it would function better. I will not take credit for this in any way or form when it was that simple. Watch yourself if you're using a well-endowed female persona, because she will definitely try to grope you too. Or maybe you'd be into that? Otherwise, enjoy your time with the famous degenerate and pervert of the Senran Kagura franchise. Take her out to get some ramen, and she'll probably be your best buddy.

As per my tradition, enjoy some images as well.
creator: Kusanagi Kosetsu
